hero.title: Automation Leader in Morocco
hero.subtitle: High-Performance Security & Prestige Automation
hero.description: Hero Metal Maroc designs, installs, and maintains your automated accesses and smart security systems. Industrial excellence at the service of your villa or business.

services.title: Our Security & Automation Solutions
services.subtext: Bespoke installations combining industrial robustness and contemporary design.

garage.title: Sectional Garage Doors
garage.desc: Elegant insulated doors that open vertically for maximum space-saving and absolute security.

gate.title: Gate Automation
gate.desc: Premium motorization for sliding or swing gates with remote control and smart integration.

barriers.title: Vehicle Access Barriers
barriers.desc: Robust automatic rising barriers with LED strips for secure residences and professional parking lots.

cctv.title: Video Surveillance & Alarm
cctv.desc: High-definition cameras and smart domes with night vision and remote control via smartphone.

access.title: Access Control
access.desc: Biometric readers, RFID badges, and keypad locks to secure and filter access to your premises.

locks.title: Smart Locks
locks.desc: High-security biometric smart locks for villa entrance doors and corporate offices.

about.title: Industrial Excellence in Morocco
about.subtitle: Who We Are
about.description: Since our establishment in Morocco, Hero Metal Maroc has become the gold standard for installing automatic gates, garage doors, and advanced electronic security systems. We partner with leading global brands to offer our clients (prestigious villas, gated communities, and enterprises) absolute reliability, tailored to the Moroccan climate and market requirements.

contact.title: Contact Our Experts
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Our advisors are ready to study your needs anywhere in Morocco.

info.address: Angle Boulevard Ghandi & Route d'El Jadida, Casablanca, Morocco

footer.description: Your trusted partner for high-end security and automation in Morocco. From study to installation and maintenance.

request.title: Request A Quote
request.subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll provide a customized solution and estimate.
request.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. Our experts will review your details and contact you shortly.
